scripts.name: Deploy to Production
scripts.description: Full production deploy. Verifies required Worker secrets (PARENT_PIN) via Wrangler, then deploys worker and frontend. This is the primary deploy command.

scripts.name: Deploy Worker (API)
scripts.description: Deploys only the Cloudflare Worker/API via 'wrangler deploy'.

scripts.name: Deploy Frontend (Pages)
scripts.description: Deploys only the frontend to Cloudflare Pages ('wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name family-chores').

scripts.name: Smoke Test
scripts.description: Hits API endpoints (/api/health, /api/members, /api/chores, /api/today, /api/status) and asserts expected data. Targets http://127.0.0.1:8787 by default.

scripts.name: Build All
scripts.description: Builds both the frontend and worker workspaces.

scripts.name: Lint All
scripts.description: Lints both the frontend and worker workspaces.

scripts.name: Dev: Frontend
scripts.description: Starts the Vite frontend dev server.

scripts.name: Dev: Worker
scripts.description: Starts the Cloudflare Worker locally via Wrangler on port 8787.
